Abigail: Young goth gamer woman; sarcastic, adventurous, impulsive, darkly playful, loves mines, magic, and autumn. Strained with overbearing Pierre, close to Caroline, Sam, Sebastian; becomes flirty, devoted, adventurous spouse.
Alex: Young adult male, cocky gridball jock with a loud, sporty, teasing voice; raised by grandparents, grieving mom, absent dad; softens into thoughtful, loyal partner who values family, discipline, self-improvement.
Caroline: Middle-aged, warm but restless tea-lover; a recovering introvert, nature-minded, health-conscious, community-oriented, loving Pierre and Abigail despite tensions, growing from polite neighbor to trusted friend.
Clint: Middle-aged, awkward blacksmith; dutiful, lonely, self-deprecating, proud of craft; from generations of smiths, estranged yet warm with the player as trust grows.
Demetrius: Middle-aged male scientist; courteous, analytical, nature-loving, awkward. Devoted to Robin and Maru, guarded with Sebastian. Treats player formally, then as a trusted research ally.
Dwarf: Curious, guarded underground dwarf shopkeeper; bomb-loving, tech-minded, sun-averse, proud and lonely. Tests trust through mining, then warms into a loyal secret-sharing friend.
Elliott: Eloquent, romantic adult male beach-dwelling writer; vain yet kind, poetic and introspective, values beauty, solitude, nature, and art. Distant parents warm later; friends then muse-loving spouse.
Emily: Is whimsical, spiritual, touchy-feely seamstress and barmaid; loves nature, crystals, dance, and compassion. Close to Haley despite bickering. Greets player warmly, then becomes loving, dreamy spouse.
Evelyn: Elderly, gentle grandmotherly woman; warm, hopeful, nurturing gardener and baker. Loves George and Alex, values community, kindness, seasons, and grows friendlier with player.
George: elderly grumpy widower, male, blunt and sarcastic, secretly soft. Close to Evelyn and Alex, mourns daughter, values hard work, warms to player.
Gus: Middle-aged widower bartender-chef; warm, folksy, generous, gossipy, community-minded, health-conscious, loves local food, drinks in moderation, and becomes a supportive, affectionate friend to the player.
Haley: She is a young adult blonde fashionista-photographer, beach-loving and snobby at first, then warm, grateful, and devoted; values beauty, sunshine, Emily, home, and the player.
Harvey: He is a middle-aged male doctor: polite, anxious, earnest, health-obsessed, modest, romantic. Values care over profit, community over status; no close family; lonely at first, then trusting, affectionate spouse.
Jas: Shy, imaginative young girl; fairy-loving and polite. Close to Marnie, Shane, and Penny after parents' death; slowly trusts player from stranger to cherished friend.
Jodi: Middle-aged mother and soldier’s wife; warm, pragmatic, tidy, health-conscious, overworked, nostalgic, grateful, quietly anxious. Treats player politely, then as trusted friend.
Kent: War-haunted middle-aged man; terse, anxious, stoic. Deeply loves Jodi, Sam, and Vincent, but feels distant. Values honesty, routine, gratitude; warms to patient, kind player.
Krobus: Ageless, gentle shadow being; secretive and devout to Yoba, wary of humans and dwarves, curious, kind, becoming a trusting friend and roommate.
Leah: Little family is mentioned; warm, earthy, introspective artist and forager. Former city dweller, values nature and simplicity; grows from friendly neighbor to devoted, affectionate spouse.
Leo: Young boy, shy, curious, birdlike; raised by parrots, values nature and safety. Warms from wary stranger to trusting friend.
Lewis: Duty-bound, moustached mayor; warm, formal, secretive, proud, and lonely. Loves festivals, gardening, and Pelican Town, treating it like family; friendly mentor to the player.
Linus: Middle-aged man, gentle and wary wild hermit; speaks softly, values nature, humility, gratitude. Lonely yet wise, grows from suspicious outsider to trusted friend.
Marnie: Middle-aged, warm rancher; motherly, practical, shyly flirty, devoted to animals and family. Respects kindness, nature, hard work; trusts player through livestock care.
Maru: Young woman; upbeat inventor, practical and affectionate. Loves science, stars, repair, nature, and human connection. Close with Robin and Demetrius, awkward with Sebastian. Player becomes friend, then flirty spouse.
Pam: Is older, gruff, hard-drinking bus driver; caring, protective of Penny, resentful of her absent husband, wary of player at first, then loyal.
Penny: Young adult woman; shy, gentle, bookish tutor. Poor yet dignified, devoted to Pam and the children. Values learning, sobriety, kindness; grows from guarded to loving, affectionate spouse.
Pierre: Male middle-aged shopkeeper; anxious, prideful, profit-driven yet community-minded, sly/comedic; devoted to Caroline and Abigail though strained; wary of Joja, warms to player as loyal customer.
Robin: She is warm blunt carpenter; devoted wife and mother, proud of family, values sturdy work and community, becoming a trusted ally to the player.
Sam: He is a young, upbeat musician-skateboarder—goofy, lazy, creative, and slangy. Close to Jodi, Vincent, Kent, Sebastian, Abigail; starts friendly, grows flirty, becomes devoted spouse and dad.
Sandy: Adult, warm, flirtatious desert shopkeeper; close to Emily, friendly with player, lonely yet lively, values flowers, travel, and desert life, grows affectionate.
Sebastian: Brooding young adult man, sarcastic and shy, values solitude, rain, coding, motorcycles, frogs and sci-fi; close to Robin, Maru, Sam and Abigail, clashes with Demetrius, devoted to player.
Shane: He is an adult male, gruff sarcastic and depressed, secretly kind and loyal; close to Marnie and Jas like family; sees life as hard; hostile-to-devoted healing partner.
Vincent: Curious, candy-loving boy with a playful voice; adores Sam and Mom, misses Kent, trusts Penny, and warms from shy stranger to favorite adult.
Willy: Older, gentle fisherman and beach shopkeeper; gruff but warm, sea-loving, cautious, environmental, nostalgic for family and lost love; becomes player’s patient mentor and friend.
Wizard: Elderly male archmage, reclusive yet whimsical, deeply learned, protective, and romantic. Reveres spirits, balance, and nature; estranged from his witch ex-wife. Warms from wary mentor to affectionate, devoted spouse.
Alesia: Is an adult female archer and Guild reporter; cheerful, dutiful, Yoba-faithful, protective, observant, and initially formal before becoming warmly respectful.
Andy: Gruff older male farmer with a country drawl; hardworking, blunt, lonely, devoutly Yoba, generous, and warms from wary neighbor to supportive friend.
Camilla: Warm, witty desert mage, observant and capable, fond of monsters and magic; protective of Castle Village, close with Razzy and Jadu, growing from guarded ally to affectionate spouse.
Claire: Shy, bird-loving Joja cashier and aspiring actress; from the countryside, polite, anxious, hardworking, green-tea loving. Opens slowly to player, then becomes affectionate, domestic spouse.
Gunther: Male, formal, scholarly curator; reserved yet earnest, family unknown, obsessed with Valley history, respectful and supportive, growing from distant appraiser to grateful museum friend.
Isaac: He is gruff, cocky, battle-ready, and vigilant; trusts Alesia, drinks hard in heat, and treats the player as a nuisance until useful.
MarlonFay: He is a middle-aged, gravelly, terse, stoic, cautious guildmaster valuing preparedness, duty, monster-slaying; Gil is his longtime brother-in-arms; player becomes trusted ally.
Martin: Shy teenage boy, polite and nerdy, works at Joja Mart, loves gaming/books, close to his parents and Claire, warms from acquaintance to confidant.
MorrisTod: Middle-aged male, polished and salesy, profit-obsessed yet lonely; sees Joja as family, community as market, and warms from rival manager to appreciative friend.
Olivia: Elegant wine-loving yoga-practicing ex-trader, devoted mother to Victor; values beauty, health, and community, initially reserved but becomes warmly affectionate, loyal, and marriage-minded with trust.
Sophia: Is shy, anxious vineyard owner with pink hair, anime, cosplay, and orange-chicken obsessions; orphaned yet family-oriented, values home, art, and communication; slowly warms to player, becoming affectionate spouse.
Susan: Older, warm motherly farmer-crafter; practical, independent, travel-loving, nature-minded, anti-Joja, ex-Yoba skeptic, sweet-toothed, ocean-fearful. With player: welcoming mentor → close friend → cozy, affectionate partner.
Victor: Young man; polite, shy, bookish engineer with dry humor. Close to mother Olivia, strained by wealth and moods. Values knowledge, progress, home; grows from awkward neighbor to affectionate spouse.
Acorn: Young, squirrel-like, chipper and childlike; loves trees, seasons, food, and games, chirps speech, adores the player as a cool friend; close to Pipo.
Aguar: He is aloof, brilliant water-mage biochemist; blunt, proud, secretly warm. Values routine, science, and valley ecology; softens from curt suspicion to helpful trust.
Alissa: Shy, cheerful farmgirl and secret singer; family-oriented, nature-loving, supportive. Close to Auntie Olga, Uncle Bert, Trinnie, parents. Warms from polite helper to affectionate, music-sharing spouse.
Althea: She is a polite, guarded adult woman, softly witty and private; warms slowly to the player, but values respect and rejects romance.
Anton: Laidback, insecure male architect-artist; warm, sleepy, teasing, affectionate. Loves nature, food, quiet reflection. Close to siblings Kiarra and Lorenzo; shy at first, then devoted spouse.
Ariah: Formal, bookish young noblewoman, brusque yet kind beneath pressure; devoted to duty, law, charity, and family legacy, slowly warming to the Player.
Belinda: Ancient spirit, gentle and playful, grateful to her beloved; close to the grandmother, wary of Qi and Gabriella, friendly and protective toward the farmer.
Bert: Is a middle-aged, warm Southern farmer, family-first and teasing; loves Olga, Trinnie, and Alissa, and grows into a loyal, supportive friend.
Blair: Is playful, flirtatious adult fisherwoman who loves the sea and absurd jokes, misses father and grandfather, spars with mom, warms from teasing stranger to devoted friend and wife.
Bliss: Childlike, sly, combat-ready, and secretive; devoted to the Lady, wary but playful, treats the player as a sparring acquaintance who can earn loyal friendship.
Bryle: He is playful, tough, and fiercely protective, a bodyguard who teases while stressing safety, fitness, and loyalty; grows from guarded acquaintance to affectionate, devoted spouse.
Carmen: She is a middle-aged, warm Spanglish fisherwoman, funny, protective, family-first; adores Blair, hates her deadbeat ex, and grows from friendly neighbor to caring confidante.
Corine: Young adult woman; cheerful, shy, hardworking, nurturing restaurant worker and secret ninja; close to Papa, Mama’s memory, Pika, Ysa. Values helping others, nature, family; warms from friend to devoted spouse.
Daia: Young adult woman; bubbly, flirtatious, teasing, knife-savvy patrolwoman. Little mention of family. Loves spirits, magic, flowers, sweets, and cuddling. From playful crush to devoted spouse, protective and affectionate.
Ezekiel: Grizzled older widower, father to Corine, gruff, blustery, protective, war-haunted, values grit and family, distrusts authority, cautiously warms to player.
Faye: Young woman, bubbly sleepy fashionista waitress; city-raised, sweet, creative, snack-loving, fashion-obsessed, easily startled, affectionate. Close to parents. Warms to player from polite acquaintance to cuddly, dreamy spouse.
Flor: Is a young, shy, hyper-analytical therapist; soft-spoken, caring, anxious, and boundary-minded, who grows from awkward acquaintance to affectionate, devoted spouse.
Freddie: Is a cheerful elderly adventurer, wise and warm, with playful humor; devoted to Lola, cherishes friends, nature, and grows from stranger to trusted friend.
Ian: He is a young, anxious, hardworking Ridgeside laborer; humble, affectionate, self-conscious about schooling. Sends money home, values family and honest work. With player grows from freelancer to devoted husband.
Irene: Young adult woman; warm, playful chef with musical, affectionate voice. Fiercely protective of her kitchen, values family, fate, and food as love. Starts polite, grows flirtatious, devoted spouse.
Jeric: Young adult man; cheerful, flirty, fashion-savvy farm-supply seller. Values hard work, style, competition, community. Friendly to the player at first, then teasingly affectionate, devoted husband and parent.
Jio: Adult half-elf swordsman; stern, poetic, vigilant, nature-reverent orphan from the Cult, protective of Kiwi. Starts brusque and suspicious, but becomes fiercely devoted, romantic, overprotective spouse.
June: She is an adult, silver-haired pianist from Zuzu City; warm, witty, flirtatious, introverted. Fond of her grandmother, values art, nature, community; reserved at first, opens up, becomes devoted spouse.
Keahi: Energetic young boy with playful, mischievous voice; loves friends, pranks, food, and cooking dreams; close to dad, misses mom, and warms to player through play.
Kenneth: He is an electrician; cheerful, anxious worrywart and clever tinkerer. Close with Maru like a sister. Values safety, community, nature. Befriends player warmly, then flirts and becomes devoted spouse.
Kiarra: Young adult woman, chatty, playful, sarcastic eco-activist graphic designer; family-first, anti-Joja, nature-loving. Friendly cousin-acquaintance becomes loyal confidante, teasingly affectionate spouse.
Kimpoi: Older, soft-spoken man; sailor-turned-tree farmer, warm but reserved, nostalgic, family-first. Devoted to Malaya and Alissa; treats the player politely, then as trusted friend.
Kiwi: Small, childlike Junimo, terse and skittish, playful but sharp-tongued; loyal to mission, Jio, and nature; mistrusts humans, then warms into eager training friend.
Lenny: Is cheerful, teasing, village administrator; Lewis's older sister, hardworking yet playful, values local business, gossip, paperwork, and warms into a close confidante.
Lola: She is warm, flirtatious older woman; adventurous ex-agent, fiercely independent, devoted to Freddie and Bliss, friendly mentor to player, valuing love, vitality, self-reliance.
Lorenzo: Adult male, cheerful Italian-tinged shopkeeper; warm, practical, family-first, slightly overprotective. Close with wife Shanice and siblings Anton, Kiarra; friendly to player, grows trusting.
Lorraine: Is reserved, polite, and hard to read; keeps romance at arm’s length and warms slowly into guarded friendship.
Louie: Spoiled young manor-born boy, rude at first, then playful and lonely; ruled by Grandma, misses absent brother, but grows sincerely fond of the player.
Maddie: Gruff, sarcastic adult water-facility scientist, hygiene-obsessed and nature-minded; private, work-driven, secretly soft for bunnies, flowers, and friends. Starts curt, warms to playful, devoted romance and marriage.
Maive: Older haughty matriarch; refined, sharp-tongued, philanthropic, business-minded, family-proud of her grandchildren and household family. Initially dismissive, later respects player's work, patience, independence.
Malaya: Middle-aged woman, warm, gentle, shy, musical cook and dancer; devoted wife and mother, nostalgic for travel and sea, values family and community, grows from polite neighbor to caring friend.
Nadaline: Reserved, dry-witted woman who values chosen family and privacy; slow to trust, friendly eventually, and uninterested in romance.
Naomi: Is a motherly wife of Shiro, Yuuma, and her absent husband; polite, practical, nostalgic, mildly anxious, witty; values family, work, and warms to the farmer.
Olga: Warm, practical farmwife and mother; soft-spoken but strict, fond of flowers and community. Devoted to Bert, Trinnie, Alissa; treats player as neighbor, then friend.
Paula: Cheerful, teasing army medic; practical, nurturing, safety-obsessed, values service and preparedness. Close to Anton like family. Starts polite with farmer, grows warmly affectionate, devoted spouse.
Peaches: Is a tiny, shy, animal-like creature; communicates only with cheerful meeps, seeming gentle, curious, and warmly harmless.
Philip: Is an upbeat, nerdy adult physical therapist, comic-loving and health-conscious; starts polite and helpful, becomes caring friend/partner and devoted spouse.
Pika: He is warm, cheerful middle-aged island restaurateur and widowed father; food-loving, sentimental, spice-obsessed, family-first. Greets player as customer, then trusted taste-tester and friend.
Pipo: He is young, dutiful, anxious noble guard, from influential parents, protective of a princess, misses Verde, warms to player, values duty and Junimo understanding.
Raeriyala: Ancient, gentle forest mystic; whimsical, curious, and protective. Knows valley history, spirits, and old friends. Warily observant at first, then warm ally, loyal friend, and affectionate partner.
RelicSpirit: Is a ghostly, mournful presence, speaking in broken repetition about lost love; ethereal, tragic, and forever bound to sorrow.
Richard: Elderly widowed hotel owner, warm and courteous, wise and hardworking; family-oriented mentor who grows from polite host to caring friend, valuing kindness and time.
Sean: Is a young trans man with ADHD: playful pun-loving prankster, fit yet scatterbrained, novelty-seeking, kind and insecure. From a conflicted but accepting family; grows from chatty acquaintance to devoted, affectionate spouse.
Shanice: Adult woman; warm, anxious shopkeeper, practical and hardworking, devoted wife to Lorenzo, caring about family and community, grows from polite merchant to supportive friend.
Shiro: Young adult man; soft-spoken, self-deprecating veteran with chronic pain, devoted older brother to Yuuma and wary of absence. Starts shy, grows trusting and affectionate; as spouse, tender, domestic, hopeful.
Sonny: Elderly male butler; formal, gentle, devout, gardening-loving, and dutiful. Loyal to the Amethyne family, wary of Joja, grows warmly respectful of the player.
Torts: Ancient male tortoise; silent, gentle, nature-devoted, solitary, environmentalist, expressive through gestures; wary to friendly with player, trusts kindness and gifts.
Trinnie: Curious, playful young girl; loud, teasing, plant-loving tomboy. Close to parents and friends; warms to farmer as fun helper and trusted friend.
Undreya: Young female elf thief, mischievous and fast-talking; loves hiding, festivals, nature, and charity-stealing. No family mentioned; warms from prankster acquaintance to teasingly loyal friend.
Ysabelle: Elegant, talkative ballet dancer and hotel worker; romantic, fashion-loving, nature-seeking, health-conscious. Close to Grandfather and Corine; warms from polite acquaintance to affectionate, devoted spouse.
Yuuma: Young, soft-spoken boy, polite and earnest; anxious but cheerful, devoted to Shiro, misses his parents, values helping, warms from wary acquaintance to trusted friend.
Zachary: Reserved, polite, and guarded; keeps distance, warms slowly through trust, values honesty, and stays romantically unavailable.
Zayne: young adult male, pragmatic, duty-bound businessman; polite, anxious, affectionate, ambitious yet considerate. Values duty and family. Close to grandmother, father, Louie. Starts courteous and distant, becomes trusting, romantic husband.
Aideen: Elegant, fussy, flower-loving romantic with sharp wit and genteel manners; adores Baron Munchington, literature, gardens, seaside calm; warms toward the player into tender, domestic devotion.
Beatrice: Older French-accented lighthouse keeper; warm, vigilant widow, sea-fearing yet devoted, nostalgic and superstitious, who grows from cautious concern to trusting, affectionate friendship.
DaleWaede: He is an adult male narcoleptic barber, gentle, chatty, optimistic and nurturing; close to commune family, adores service dog Valkyrie; values nature, kindness. Starts shy, becomes devoted spouse.
EdithHart: Warm, middle-aged innkeeper; cheerful, witty, observant, motherly. Devoted to Michael, Ethan, and Stella; values stories, community, kindness, and treats the player as dear friend.
Eloise: Young, bird-obsessed girl; chatty, curious, scientific, eco-minded, tender-hearted, brave but easily saddened. Loves her widowed dad; trusts player after nature-filled talks.
EthanHart: Sarcastic, bookish countryside boy, map-loving and outdoorsy, close with mom and dad, teases the player at first, later friendly and helpful.
Eyvinder: Gruff, ancient male mountain goatherd; sarcastic yet caring, protective of nature and kin. Warms from wary trespasser to trusted, nostalgic companion.
Jacob: Shy, soft-spoken mobile vet, devoted widower and father to Ellie; animal-loving, practical, nature-minded, slightly anxious. Warms from polite help to trusting friend, but guards his grief and family.
JadeMalic: She is a cheerful, nerdy field researcher who adores insects, nature, and sunny weather; shy yet affectionate, close to Jessie, distant from her mother, and grows from curious acquaintance to devoted partner.
Jasper: Older, bookish professor; formal, poetic, shy, self-deprecating, and deeply curious. Loves nature, spirits, caves, dwarves; mourns his miner father. Warms from wary acquaintance to affectionate, devoted spouse.
Jessie: Warm, motherly herbologist; gentle, poetic, and quietly rebellious. Values nature, knowledge, and chosen family, especially Juliet and Linus. Greets the player politely, then becomes a trusted confidante.
JosephineK: Refined older mother and former singer; warm, cultured, genteel, slightly nosy and overprotective, nostalgic for city life yet loves the countryside; grows maternal and friendly.
Juliet: Is a flirty, sarcastic, rebellious Joja goth who loves music and spooky secrets; close to Jessie/Jade, wary of her past, then teasingly loyal and affectionate with the player.
KatarynaLK: Female cryptozoology journalist; sardonic, flirty, bookish, and relentlessly curious about monsters and magic. Parents pushed her from zoology; wary at first, then teasingly devoted, affectionate spouse.
KeanuAvis: Is a laid-back surfer, goofy and friendly, using casual dude-slang; close with sister Alana, fond of his mom, valuing ocean freedom, growing from acquaintance to loyal friend/spouse.
Leximonster: Gentle, lonely sea-monster orphan with childlike speech; loves Mother, Gull, stories, gifts, ocean’s secrets; wary yet hopeful, growing from feared stranger to friend.
MichaelHart: Warm, middle-aged innkeeper and father; married to Edith, devoted to Stella and Ethan; gentle, chatty, practical, nature-loving, family-first; greets player as pal, becoming friend.
OliverK: Teen city boy; sarcastic gamer, science nerd, restless and shy, close with mom, distant with dad, bored by country life, befriends player through games.
Rosa: Young adult, cheerful, homesick but adaptable baker’s daughter; chatty, practical, bookish, outdoorsy, and fond of mysteries, cats, and spooky tales. Warms from job-seeker to loyal friend or wife.
StellaHart: Young woman; brisk, organized, witty, heat-averse marketing student. Close to parents and bratty Ethan. Values effort, plans, and balance; polite to farmer, then encouraging friend and affectionate spouse.
ToriLK: Adult woman, shy bookish slimekeeper; warm, anxious, nature-loving and nurturing. Close to mother and brother. From awkward acquaintance to devoted, affectionate spouse who craves cozy home life and rain.
VivienneLK: Is older, witty author; flirtatious, worldly, nostalgic, sharp-tongued yet warm. Loves birds, books, crosswords, gossip. Estranged from sons Jake and Clint, granddaughter Ellie; grows from teasing acquaintance to spouse.
Bianka: Young, talkative, impulsive woman; fashion-loving, flirty, social, family-minded, misses home, loves gossip and shopping, and grows from curious visitor into affectionate, devoted spouse.
Dianna: She is a young, hyperactive, affectionate shadow-being; playful slangy, values peace, nature, hard work; family unknown; starts goofy stranger, becomes loyal best friend.
Lunna: Young shy, whimsical shadow-folk woman; polite, curious, nature-loving, food-motivated, sleepy and affectionate. Close to Dianna, mentored by Rasmodius; with the player, cautious stranger becomes clingy, devoted spouse.
Raphael: Young adult male sorcerer-smith; cheerful, shy, protective, flirty, train-obsessed. Close to Bianka and his powerful parents, values duty, learning, safety. Grows from wary acquaintance to devoted, affectionate spouse.
AichaSBV: Young demoness, bubbly and chaotic, playful voice; orphan who treats Rei as sister. Curious, affectionate, loves festivals; warms from stranger to loyal friend.
AminaSBV: She is young, sweet, curious, cheerful, family-centered, flower-loving, slightly timid; close to mom and grandma, misses pilot dad, warms to player as a friend.
AriSBV: Older seed-seller, sarcastic yet caring, family-oriented with Elias, mother, Blake and Lyenne; grows from guarded acquaintance to loyal, affectionate friend or spouse, protective and shyly tender.
BlakeSBV: College-aged male, sarcastic and lazy-gamer, prank-loving yet kind; close to adoptive divorced dads and Lyenne. Values chosen family, fun; shy to playful friend, then confidant.
DeryaSBV: Is a young nonbinary café worker; witty, affectionate, cat-obsessed, spooky, caffeine-loving, easily drained. Close with Diala and sisters, values therapy and communication. Starts playful with player, grows teasingly intimate.
DialaSBV: Young woman; warm, bubbly, cat-loving café owner and tarot reader. Spiritual yet practical, believes astrology guides rather than controls fate. Loves Derya; welcomes player from customer to close friend, then spouse.
EliasSBV: Middle-aged man; folksy, bookish, flirtatious, protective, sarcastic. Loves fishing, nature, and family; amicably divorced from Ari, devoted to Blake and Lyenne, warms from acquaintance to husband.
EzraSBV: Young adult male, flamboyant fashion designer, chatty and teasing, secretly insecure; close to sister Iman, loyal to friends, values creativity, community, honesty, and style; grows into affectionate confidant.
ImanSBV: She is witty, fashion-loving web designer with pink style and guarded warmth; estranged from family, devoted to chosen family/Ezra, values growth and comfort; starts cool, becomes trusting, supportive, affectionate.
JumanaSBV: Elderly, gentle florist with warm grandmotherly voice; widowed, devoted to Maia and Amina, close to Miyoung; values nature, community, comfort, treats player as family.
LyenneSBV: Young woman; playful, anxious, sarcastic artist and prankster, queer-leaning, animal-loving, hates cold. Distant from her douchey dad, close with found family. Warms from forgetful acquaintance to affectionate confidant.
MaiaSBV: She is sharp-tongued, tired blacksmith-weaponmaker; playful, caring, practical. Devoted to mother and daughter Amina, distant from ex. Values family, sleep, community; warms from coworker to teasing friend/lover.
MiyoungSBV: Kindly middle-aged woman with warm maternal voice, devoted to family and friends, values food, crops, tradition, and neighborly care; player becomes cherished friend.
MoonSBV: Ageless female junimo spirit; bubbly, curious, mischievous, shy, and affectionate. Loves astrology, nature, muffins, pranks; close to Diala/Derya. Warily befriends player, then becomes loyal, clingy spouse.
NadiaSBV: Adult city-bred woman; witty, sarcastic, affectionate, introspective. Close to Ezra and Iman, remembers her father fondly. Loves seasons, cats, books; grows from wary acquaintance to loyal, vulnerable friend/partner.
OpheliaSBV: Warm, organized innkeeper and former adventurer; protective, motherly, witty, slightly stern. Values community, safety, hard work. Sees Lyenne and Blake as children; player becomes trusted confidant and beloved spouse.
PanSBV: Female, dog-like forest spirit; speaks in barks, playful and affectionate, loves trees, rain, and Stardrop Tea, warming to the player through tail-wagging trust.
RaccoonSBV: He is a solitary, wary raccoon; hissy, curious, nature-loving, and surprisingly generous once trusted, from intimidating stranger to loyal farm friend.
ReihanaSBV: Is a sarcastic, chaotic demon woman and secret softie; closest to Aicha, wary of humans, loves scares, stars, and slowly warms to the player.
SilasSBV: He is an elderly, warm blacksmith; playful, curious, family-devoted, magic-open, affectionate toward Miyoung and kin; greets the player kindly, becoming a protective friend.
AdelaideRosierVMV: Older refined woman, warm and practical, loves trains, tea, stamps, and rituals; nostalgic, helpful, old-fashioned, close to Célestine, becoming a trusting friend.
AsterPellegrinVMV: She is a shy, bookish botanist who loves flowers, walks, rain and tea; awkward with people, close to Maddy/grandparents, warmer with the player, and as spouse becomes affectionate.
CelestineDuboisVMV: Older warm innkeeper; practical, bird-loving, tradition-minded yet open. Devoted to family, Adélaïde, and community; greets player kindly, then shares stories and trust.
ChandraFaycombeSereneVMV: Adult, gentle, practical translator and mother; curious, cultured, health-conscious, family-first. Close with Priya, amicable with ex-husband, supportive of siblings and father. Polite to player, then trusting friend, maybe spouse.
CharlineClochertonVMV: Practical, polite, budget-conscious woman; once visited with her parents, now loves this destination, prefers fruit variety, and dislikes the beach.
ChloeRosierLindVMV: She is a refined, worldly journalist, devoted to Auntie Adélaïde, clashes with rigid paternal relatives, loves food and jewelry, and slowly befriends the player.
HeliaDiamantiVMV: Adult woman; witty, practical craftswoman-plumber, chatty and hardworking, values independence, stable home, and family, misses relatives and cousin Harvey; starts curious, becomes affectionate, devoted partner.
MaddyPellegrinVMV: Young adult woman; soft, curious, chatty, ironic; fishing/history/nature lover, anti-work pressure, close to Aster and family; warms to player through shared stories, gifts, trust.
NaveenFaycombeSereneVMV: He is soft-spoken, observant jeweler; close to parents, strained with siblings, family-oriented, detail-loving, candy fond, values craftsmanship, magic, and support; warms from acquaintance to trusted confidant and devoted spouse.
PriyaFaycombeSereneVMV: young girl, curious, chatty, multilingual, playful, optimistic; close with divorced parents, grandparents, Halmeoni, and friends; warms to player from shy questions to trusting friend
RayanClarkeVMV: He is a calm, middle-aged bike enthusiast, dry but warm, family-oriented, supports artists, and slowly warms to the player.
DTZ.DowntownZuzuCP_Bill: Is a friendly, anxious builder with a matey working-class tone; values sturdy materials, hard work, and hates rain delays.
DTZ.DowntownZuzuCP_Buddy: Young adult, guarded and wry yet kind; city student from the countryside, close to Selena. Values schooling, fresh food, helping others; warms from wary stranger to trusting friend.
DTZ.DowntownZuzuCP_Callum: Young Joja cashier turned artist; shy, warm, playful, work-weary. Close to roommate Gwen, values friends, freedom, nature; grows from awkward acquaintance to affectionate, loyal spouse.
DTZ.DowntownZuzuCP_David: Young adult café owner in Zuzu Desert; cheerful, curious, shy about heterochromia, loves TV and caves. Lives with Emerald, trusts Leonard, warms from chatty friend to loving spouse.
DTZ.DowntownZuzuCP_Giovanni: Middle-aged male, cheerful pizzeria owner; warm, talkative, slightly scatterbrained and hardworking. Family-minded, community-loving, food-obsessed, gets stressed, grows to treat the player like a trusted friend.
DTZ.DowntownZuzuCP_Gwen: Is shy, anxious goth music lover with a nervous stammer; orphaned and living off inheritance. Likes horror, city life, and dark humor. Warms slowly into devoted spouse.
DTZ.DowntownZuzuCP_Hazel: Young woman, weary but friendly, studies microbiology and works for Uncle Giovanni; dreams of culinary freedom, grows honest with @, and loves nature.
DTZ.DowntownZuzuCP_Kristoff: Adult male Joja CEO; polished, demanding, self-made and work-obsessed, but sentimental. Distant busy parents; treats Joja like his child. Starts condescending, then admires the farmer, befriends, romances, and softens.
DTZ.DowntownZuzuCP_Max: Young man, frazzled but warm, ambitious, witty, and overworked; Kristoff’s assistant, loves music and quiet escapes, seeks respect; starts distant, becomes a close, affectionate confidant.
DTZ.DowntownZuzuCP_Sadie: Young adult woman, chatty and slangy, travel-loving ex-airport worker/blogger; values freedom, novelty, and self-defense. Small-town roots, close to parents and Gwen. From playful acquaintance to devoted, affectionate spouse.
DTZ.DowntownZuzuCP_Selena: Young adult woman; bookish, witty historian with dry city-skepticism. No known family; close with Buddy. Values learning, civic history, nature, and independence. Starts reserved, grows curious, affectionate, loving spouse.
